summary: The page scores 99/100 on performance. No high-severity issues were found.

findings.title: Largest Contentful Paint
findings.description: LCP: 1.3 s mobile / 0.2 s desktop; budget 2.5 s
findings.evidence: LCP is within budget on desktop but slightly above on mobile.

findings.title: Cumulative Layout Shift
findings.evidence: CLS is within budget on both mobile and desktop.

findings.title: Speed Index
findings.description: Speed Index: 3.4 s mobile / 0.6 s desktop
findings.evidence: Speed Index is higher on mobile than desktop.

findings.title: Optimize DOM size
findings.evidence: The DOM size is relatively small.
